issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across multiple workflows, including pre-referral and post-referral stages. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot, which caused leads to qualify for multiple workflow branches simultaneously. HubSpot support was engaged and resolved the underlying association/filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the extra duplicate tasks on each affected deal.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were continuing to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of being unenrolled. The workflow filters did not include Closed Lost or Transferred deal stages as suppression or unenrollment criteria. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters on March 9 to resolve this.
issues.workaround: Manually complete or delete any outstanding post-referral tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails displaying previous loan officer instead of updated LO
issues.desc: After a loan officer change on a deal, automated agent-facing emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the newly assigned one. The issue was identified as a product-level integration problem rather than a workflow configuration issue. Luis resolved the issue on March 13.
issues.workaround: For any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually send the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering when deal stage toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed due to a fallen contract, and then set back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks and closing info collection did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted update. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria on March 16 to fix this.
issues.workaround: For any deals that were toggled back to Offer Accepted before March 16 and did not receive TC tasks, manually enroll the deal in the Offer Accepted workflow to trigger the closing info collection tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering enrollment into the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their associated tasks. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and believed to be resolved after a support interaction on April 1. The exact root cause was not publicly disclosed, though missing lender assignment was initially suspected.
issues.workaround: For MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between the start of the impact window and April 1, manually enroll each deal in the TC workflow to generate the required closing tasks.
